# Hila Teller, LCSW

> Compassionate psychotherapy for adults in Los Altos, CA. Specializing in trauma, PTSD, CPTSD, anxiety, depression, sexual abuse, and life transitions.

Hila Teller is a Licensed Clinical Social Worker (LCSW) based in Los Altos, California. She offers individual adult psychotherapy (ages 18+) using a psychodynamic approach — exploring how past experiences and unconscious patterns shape current feelings and relationships. Sessions are available in-person in Los Altos and via telehealth throughout California. Fee: $240/session. Free 15-minute phone consultation available. Response within 24 hours.

## Contact

- Phone: 408-412-1517
- Email: hilatellerlcsw@gmail.com
- Address: 885 North San Antonio Road, Los Altos, CA 94022
- Serving: Los Altos, Mountain View, Palo Alto, Sunnyvale, and all of California via telehealth

## Pages

- [Home](https://hilateller.com/): Overview of practice, specialties, and how to get started
- [About](https://hilateller.com/about.html): Background, training, and therapeutic approach
- [Services](https://hilateller.com/services.html): Session fees, insurance (superbill), and areas of expertise
- [Contact](https://hilateller.com/contact.html): Free 15-min consultation, contact form, phone, address

## Areas of Specialty

Trauma, PTSD, Complex PTSD (CPTSD), anxiety, depression, sexual abuse, childhood trauma, relationship issues, life transitions, postpartum depression and anxiety, low self-esteem, LGBTQ+ affirming therapy, women's issues, grief and loss.
